updates.heading: 5/5 L5 Offers Accepted This Quarter — Positive Exec Feedback
bullets: Kristin and Jaime met with Mike Tria (R&D Exec) to share monthly reporting updates
5 of 5 L5 offers accepted so far this quarter — Mike Tria called it out as unprecedented: 'I don't think I've ever seen that, huge kudos to the team'
Some adjustments to reporting approach are coming — Kristin to share more details

updates.heading: Headcount & Capacity Planning Audit — Jaime & Lisa Leading
bullets: Jaime and Lisa are running a headcount planning audit across all PE orgs
Asked all PEs to complete audit doc covering tools, planning process, and pain points by June 10
Outputs will inform Cycle 2 initiative: Headcount & Capacity Planning Discovery & Framework (DRI: Jaime, Lisa)

updates.heading: Build V1 Centralized Recruiting Reporting Dashboard — Jaime & Teresa Co-DRIs
bullets: Jaime and Teresa are co-DRIs on the Cycle 2 initiative to build a centralized reporting dashboard for R&D

Kebone has already built an R&D open reqs tracker (Google Apps Script, auto-updated daily at 9am) as a starting point: https://script.google.com/a/macros/gusto.com/s/AKfycbzXPN5vU0DcEqz4vq1Pcq5Q8j0A2DOLAktC-PhF9ke_-n4pZFJCcJs8K5CWnIwLx5OHGw/exec

updates.heading: Weekly Recap Agent — Plugin Updated
bullets: Jaime updated the Weekly Recap plugin and Notion page instructions
Lisa Pham gave a shoutout this week — ran it before her team meeting and said it 'surfaced everything I needed'

updates.heading: Requisition Process Improvements — Saumya Chopra Joining Next PE Meeting
bullets: Saumya Chopra (PeopleTech) joining PE meeting next Wednesday to discuss:
1. Requisition multi-step approval process pain points
2. Requisition routing based on job details / org structure
Goal: hear directly from PEs to determine what changes to prioritize with PeopleTech
